summary: A man is dead after an early morning shooting in Holiday, and the suspected gunman is in custody, according to the Pasco Sheriff's Office.

title: Hillsborough tests voting machines, reminds voters of key Florida primary deadlines
summary: As Florida's primary election draws closer, Hillsborough County election officials have completed one of the most important steps before voting begins: publicly testing the machines that will count ballots.

title: 4,000 residents without power in Pinellas after storms
summary: About 4,000 residents in Pinellas County were without power Friday after storms moved through the area, utility officials said.

title: News to Know for July 17
summary: Recap of Trump's primetime speech. Plus, 4,000 residents without power in Pinellas after morning storms.

title: 1 dead after shooting in Holiday, investigation underway: PSO
summary: The Pasco County Sheriff's Office (PSO) said a man is dead after an overnight shooting in Holiday on Friday.

title: Pinellas County preschoolers receive a big boost when it comes to literacy
summary: The Early Learning Coalition of Pinellas County just received a $1.2 million grant to go toward improving child literacy.

title: Taco Bell lettuce supplier under investigation in cyclospora illness outbreak
summary: Taco Bell removed lettuce from select locations after a multistate cyclospora outbreak linked to shredded iceberg lettuce sickened thousands.

title: Sinkhole causes road closure on Bahia Vista St. in Sarasota: SSO
summary: Sarasota County Sheriff's Office said eastbound lanes of Bahia Vista Street are closed due to a sinkhole.

title: Air quality crisis deepens as wildfire smoke covers Great Lakes, East Coast
summary: Smoke from Canadian and Minnesota wildfires blanketed parts of the Midwest and East Coast, triggering hazardous air alerts and health warnings for millions.

title: 'I'm not giving up': Florida mom battles Medicaid denials for special needs son
summary: A Florida mother is appealing three Medicaid denials for a specialized safety bed prescribed as medically necessary for her 11-year-old adopted son, who has autism and developmental disabilities.

title: Braden Castle ruins in Bradenton mark the site where a sugar plantation once stood
summary: The ruins of Braden Castle in Bradenton tell the story of a sugar plantation, a Seminole attack, and a community that still thrives today.

title: Thousands of people cruise to Anna Maria Island on Bradenton’s Gulf Islands Ferry
summary: The Gulf Islands Ferry connects Bradenton's Riverwalk to Anna Maria Island in 45 minutes. Tickets start at $11 for adults; kids under four ride free.

title: LECOM Ball Park in Bradenton builds community connections on and off the baseball field
summary: LECOM Ball Park in Bradenton is expanding its community presence with 100-plus local events in 2025 and a new city park breaking ground in June.

title: The Nest at Robinson Preserve offers families trails, kayaking, and treetop views in Manatee County
summary: Robinson Preserve's Nest Nature Center in Manatee County offers 500 annual programs, a shaded playground, and 20-plus miles of trails and kayaking routes.

title: From wilderness settlement to riverfront city, Bradenton's history spans more than 180 years
summary: From a wilderness settlement in 1842 to a thriving riverfront city, Bradenton's history is still visible in its streets, structures, and ballpark.

title: Two teens in stolen vehicle rescued after trying to swim across Manatee River: MCSO
summary: Two teenagers driving a stolen vehicle were arrested on Wednesday after trying to escape by swimming across the Manatee River, authorities said.

Polk County Fire Rescue to approve new Delta shift schedule to reduce hours, overtime
summary: Polk County Fire Rescue and its union reached a tentative agreement Tuesday to launch a new scheduling shift designed to improve work-life balance for local firefighters.

title: Clearwater Duke Energy deal: City council clears first vote on 30-year contract
summary: Clearwater city leaders voted unanimously Thursday to advance a 30-year franchise contract with Duke Energy, choosing corporate power over a proposed public alternative.

title: President Donald Trump claims new documents show widespread vulnerabilities in US election security
summary: On Thursday, President Trump said he would declassify documents that showed a history of security threats and foreign influence aimed at U.S. elections. Scripps News is reviewing the documents.

title: Duke Energy's future looking bright in Clearwater following unanimous City Council vote
summary: After a unanimous vote in favor of Duke Energy's new 30-year agreement with the City of Clearwater, the deal now heads for a second reading despite public pushback Thursday evening.

title: Church pastor describes gunshots after 2 Hillsborough County deputies were shot
summary: A pastor at a church in Ruskin described hearing the gunfire after the Hillsborough County Sheriff's Office said a suspect shot two deputies on Thursday.
